Package cz.cvut.fel.omo.builders

Class HouseBuilder

java.lang.Object
cz.cvut.fel.omo.builders.HouseBuilder
public class HouseBuilder
extends java.lang.Object
This class builds a new house instance.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Oľga Ostashchuk, Tereza Lodrová, Michal Pechník

    Build new Window in room.

    Returns whether the floor exists.

      public boolean doesRoomExist​(java.lang.String roomName)
